name: io.github.ysalitrynskyi/opn-mcp
description: Shorten links, read click analytics, generate branded QR codes, and manage links on opn.onl — the open-source, self-hostable URL shortener. Works with the hosted service or your own instance.

environmentVariables.name: OPN_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Your opn.onl API key (create one under Settings → API Keys).

environmentVariables.name: OPN_BASE_URL
environmentVariables.description: API base URL. Set this to your own instance's API for a self-hosted opn.onl.
